faqs.q: How long does a landing page take?
faqs.a: A custom landing page is delivered in 3-5 business days, depending on complexity.

faqs.q: What's the difference from a regular website?
faqs.a: A landing page is targeted for one specific action (campaign), while a website is the full online presence.

faqs.q: Does it work for Google Ads?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Optimized for Google Ads with high Quality Score and fast load times.
Yes, we provide 1 month of free support for small changes and ensuring functionality.
